subject: A hooded figure in dark clothing stands in a foggy exterior, flanked by glowing golden spirit animals
description: A figure wearing a black hooded cloak stands at roughly center-frame in a three-quarter pose, looking slightly downward or off to the side with a guarded, resigned expression. Hair is dark and partially visible beneath the hood. On their wrist is a green-lit technological device — a wristband or scanner — suggesting a modern or retrofuturistic setting. Flanking the figure on both sides are two golden spirit-form animals: on the left a cat-like shape, on the right a bear-like shape, both rendered in warm glowing amber energy. The background is a grey, fog-laden exterior with abstract vertical forms suggesting an urban or industrial structure, and silhouettes of birds visible high in the background.
foreground: Hooded figure with dark hair, green-lit wristband device, flanked by golden spirit animals
background: Grey fog with vertical structural forms and distant bird silhouettes
emotion: guarded, weary, resigned — done with hope
